markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gathering customer feedback for an upcoming renewal and exploring future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**High Satisfaction, Low Output:** Webstacks is highly satisfied with GrowthX's quality, performance, and relationship (all 8–9/10), but output is low (6/10) due to a recent shift to a word-count-based scope.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Value Is Strategic, Not Execution:** Webstacks sees GrowthX's value in strategic guidance, not just execution. Without a strategic roadmap, the work is perceived as a commodity that could be done cheaper by contractors.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Renewal Path Requires a Plan:** Webstacks will consider an annual contract if GrowthX provides a clear, strategic roadmap for future content, enabling Webstacks to justify increased investment to its leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Internal Scorecard

[Marcel introduced GrowthX's internal scorecard to frame the feedback discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

  - [**Quality:** 8–9/10](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Output:** 6/10](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Performance:** 8–9/10](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Relationship:** 8–9/10](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### The Output Gap & Strategic Value

  - [**Output:** The 6/10 score is attributed to a recent shift to a word-count-based scope.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Value Perception:** Webstacks values GrowthX for strategic guidance, not execution.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [**Execution:** Could be done cheaper by contractors (e.g., via Upwork).](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [**Strategy:** GrowthX's experience across many clients is the key differentiator and the basis for its price.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Attribution Challenge:** Direct attribution is difficult, but Webstacks sees a clear correlation between GrowthX's work and significant increases in LLM search traffic and organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### The Renewal Path

  - [**GrowthX's Goal:** Convert the current 3-month contract to an annual agreement to justify the high-value team (director, strategist, writer, PM) on a lower-than-average contract.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Webstacks' Condition:** An annual contract is contingent on GrowthX providing a strategic roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Why:** A roadmap enables Webstacks to tell a compelling story to leadership (Nikon, Sean) to justify the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Example:** The "AI for web management" content series was successful because it had a clear 6-week plan, allowing for targeted execution and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Share feedback with the GrowthX team to develop a strategic roadmap for Webstacks.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Propose an annual contract with the new roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Jesse:**](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Discuss the annual contract and roadmap proposal with Nikon.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Coordinate a Bay Area visit with Marcel for a process deep-dive and a Warriors game.](https://fathom.video/share/inaU2Eq7uUzczi8J-8Ph-iT5FEgUvmHs?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
